prompt: Firmware project with PlatformIO. It targets two boards — an ESP-01S (ESP8266) and an ESP32. I want mise tasks to build, flash, and open the serial monitor, selecting the board, plus a task that turns the binary files in assets/ into C headers I can #include. There's some Python build tooling involved too.
assertions: both boards reachable (ESP-01/ESP8266 + ESP32 envs in platformio.ini)
every task file follows the contract
